description: Query the Synapse data model and return details for given type or form (i.e. "inet:ipv4" for an IPv4 IP address).

outputs.description: The docstring associated with the particular Synapse model element. Synapse.Model.Example An example of the given Synapse element.
outputs.name: Synapse.Model.Doc

outputs.description: A form is the definition of an object in the Synapse data model (node). Synapse.Model.Properties The unique properties associated with the given Synapse object.
outputs.name: Synapse.Model.Form

outputs.description: A Type is the definition of a data element within the data model. Synapse.Model.Valu The given value of the Synapse object type.
outputs.name: Synapse.Model.Type
